2604.04815.title: LiveFact: A Dynamic, Time-Aware Benchmark for LLM-Driven Fake News Detection
2604.04815.paper_summary: The rapid development of Large Language Models (LLMs) has transformed fake news detection and fact-checking tasks from simple classification to complex reasoning. However, evaluation frameworks have not kept pace. Current benchmarks are static, making them vulnerable to benchmark data contamination (BDC) and ineffective at assessing reasoning under temporal uncertainty. To address this, we introduce LiveFact a continuously updated benchmark that simulates the real-world "fog of war" in misinformation detection. LiveFact uses dynamic, temporal evidence sets to evaluate models on their ability to reason with evolving, incomplete information rather than on memorized knowledge. We propose a dual-mode evaluation: Classification Mode for final verification and Inference Mode for evidence-based reasoning, along with a component to monitor BDC explicitly. Tests with 22 LLMs show that open-source Mixture-of-Experts models, such as Qwen3-235B-A22B, now match or outperform proprietary state-of-the-art systems. More importantly, our analysis finds a significant "reasoning gap." Capable models exhibit epistemic humility by recognizing unverifiable claims in early data slices-an aspect traditional static benchmarks overlook. LiveFact sets a sustainable standard for evaluating robust, temporally aware AI verification.
2604.04815.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）的快速發展已將假新聞檢測和事實查核任務從簡單的分類轉變為複雜的推理。<lb/>然而，評估框架並未與時俱進。<lb/>當前的基準是靜態的，使其容易受到基準數據污染（BDC）的影響，並且在評估面對時間不確定性下的推理時效果不佳。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們推出了LiveFact，一個持續更新的基準，模擬在錯誤信息檢測中的現實世界“戰爭迷霧”。<lb/>LiveFact使用動態的時間證據集來評估模型在處理不斷演變的、不完整的信息時的推理能力，而不是基於記憶的知識。<lb/>我們提出了一種雙模式評估：分類模式用於最終驗證，推理模式用於基於證據的推理，並增加了一個明確監控BDC的組件。<lb/>對22個LLM的測試顯示，開源的專家混合模型，例如Qwen3-235B-A22B，現在已經能夠匹配或超越專有的最先進系統。<lb/>更重要的是，我們的分析發現了一個顯著的“推理差距”。<lb/>能夠的模型通過識別早期數據片段中的不可驗證聲明來表現出認識論的謙遜——這是傳統靜態基準所忽視的方面。<lb/>LiveFact為評估穩健的、具時間意識的AI驗證設立了一個可持續的標準。
2604.04815.author: Cheng Xu et.al.
2604.04815.authors: Cheng Xu, Changhong Jin, Yingjie Niu, Nan Yan, Yuke Mei, Shuhao Guan, Liming Chen, M-Tahar Kechadi
